community.subtitle: LAUNCH holders can propose new ideas and vote on ecosystem decisions. Each new project means more revenue flowing back to holders.

vision.text: We are building a multi-project startup ecosystem inside Axiome. Each product (Heads or Tails, and more to come) has its own token and economy, while LAUNCH holders earn revenue from every project. Our mission is sustainable Web3 products — not hype.

why.title: Why this exists
why.problemText1: Creating tokens is easy. Understanding them isn't.
why.problemText2: Most tokens launch without context: no official links, no clear description, no history, no community review — and trust collapses.
why.solutionText1: A verified profile layer for every token.
why.solutionText2: Axiome Launch adds project pages, token passports, community discussion, and transparent economics — so good projects stand out.

features.title: What you can do on Axiome Launch
features.subtitle: Everything a token needs to build trust — from creation to community feedback.

overview.title: Axiome Startup Ecosystem
overview.subtitle: A multi-project Web3 ecosystem on Axiome blockchain. Each project has its own token — LAUNCH ties them all together.
overview.description: We build independent products inside the Axiome ecosystem. Our first live project is Heads or Tails — a PvP game on COIN token. LAUNCH is the ecosystem token: holders earn revenue from every project we create. Token discovery, community, and governance — all in one place.
overview.card1Desc: Live PvP game on COIN token — 50/50, instant results
overview.card2Desc: Ecosystem token — earn revenue from all projects
overview.card3Desc: Propose ideas, vote, and shape the ecosystem

coinflip.title: Heads or Tails
coinflip.subtitle: PvP coin flip game on Axiome blockchain. Two players bet COIN tokens, one creates a bet and the other accepts — winner takes 90%, 10% goes as platform commission.
coinflip.howDesc: Simple 50/50 mechanics powered by commit-reveal scheme. The creator's choice is sealed on-chain as a hash. When an opponent accepts, the result is determined and paid out instantly in a single atomic transaction.
coinflip.step1Desc: Buy COIN tokens on the presale and deposit them to your game vault. This is your in-game balance.
coinflip.step2Desc: Set your bet amount (min 1 COIN) and create a bet. Or browse open bets and accept one with a single click.
coinflip.step3Desc: When a bet is accepted, the smart contract verifies the creator's secret, determines the winner, and distributes the payout — all in one atomic transaction. No delays.
coinflip.step4Desc: Winner receives 90% of the total pot. 10% goes as platform commission.
coinflip.step5Desc: Invite friends via referral link — earn up to 3% of each pot from your referrals' games across 3 levels.
coinflip.commissionDesc: 10% of each pot goes as platform commission. Winner gets 90% of the total.
coinflip.securityDesc: All logic is on-chain via CosmWasm smart contract. Commit-reveal scheme ensures provable fairness — no one can cheat. Funds are locked in the contract until the result is determined.
coinflip.paramRevealTimeout: Bet expiration: auto-cancel after 3 hours if not accepted
coinflip.paramOneClick: Account activation: one-time Authz delegation for 30 days (no signature per game)
coinflip.coinTokenDesc: COIN is a CW20 token on Axiome blockchain, created specifically for the Heads or Tails game. Buy COIN on the presale page, deposit to your game balance, and start playing.
coinflip.referralDesc: Earn a share of the pot when your referrals play. 3-level system:
coinflip.eventsDesc: The platform hosts regular contests and raffles with real COIN prizes. Contests count your bets automatically — just play. Raffles require clicking 'Join'. Prizes are funded from the 10% commission.

projects.createDesc: Publish your project idea, description, and links. Get feedback from the community.
projects.commentsDesc: Comment on tokens and projects. Community-driven signal and ratings.

vision.title: Long-term vision
vision.text: We're building a sustainable multi-project Web3 ecosystem. Each product (like Heads or Tails) has its own token and economy. LAUNCH holders benefit from every project's success. No hype — real products, real revenue, real value.

disclaimer.text: LAUNCH is an ecosystem token. COIN is the Heads or Tails game token. Gaming involves risk — only bet what you can afford to lose. We do not promise returns. Play responsibly.
